questions.question: Describe the main difference between the Transport Layer 4 (TCP) and Transport Layer 5 (UDP) protocols, and provide an example of each.
questions.hint: Focus on the primary functions of TCP and UDP

questions.question: What is the purpose of the sequence number in TCP, and how does it relate to the concept of packet ordering?
questions.hint: Consider the implications of packet loss or tampering

questions.question: Explain the concept of connection-oriented vs connectionless communication, using an example to illustrate the key differences between TCP and UDP.
questions.hint: Compare and contrast the characteristics of TCP and UDP
